[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [layering](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeLayer](../../TextmodeLayer.md) / font

# Accessor: font

## Get Signature

```ts
get font(): 
  | TextmodeFont
  | TextmodeTileset;
```

Font or tileset used by this layer.

### Returns

  \| [`TextmodeFont`](../../../../fonts/classes/TextmodeFont.md)
  \| [`TextmodeTileset`](../../../../fonts/classes/TextmodeTileset.md)
